form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 8th (Fr1) over 2000m at Temora, at the bell was 3rd-4.2 beaten 14 m by Millwood Grace (2:30.20) in NR up to 53 on April 6 at $12. Before that 8th (Fr6) over 2240m at Goulburn, at the bell was 7th-14.7 beaten 14 m by Lit The Wick (2:49.50) in NR up to 52 on March 30 at $34. Not keen.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 1710m after racing wide at Goulburn, at the bell was 2nd-3.4 beaten 9 m by Where Back (2:02.20) in NR up to 62 on March 30 at $4.80. Draws well and is working up to a win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 1710m after racing wide at Goulburn, at the bell was 2nd-3.4 beaten 9 m by Where Back (2:02.20) in NR up to 62 on March 30 at $4.80. Draws well and is working up to a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Fractious during the early stages of the score up.

form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle, at the bell was 5th-8.27 beaten 14 m by Gipsy Princess (1:52.90) in NR up to 80 M on March 27 at $31. The run before 5th (Fr2) over 1609m after showing early speed at Menangle was 7th-12.83 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Farfalla Stride (1:52.80) in NR up to 75 M on March 21 at $71. Looks nicely placed dropping from city level.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after three-and-a-half weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 7th (Fr3) over 2170m at Junee beaten 25 m by Time To Torque (2:41.10) in NR up to 58 on March 17 at $14. Improver.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr5) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway, at the bell was 2nd-0.6 beaten 11 m by Norms Lady (2:04.90) in NR up to 57 on March 27 at $4.20. Before that, a game effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr8) over 1740m after racing wide at Riverina Paceway was 3rd-1.5 at the bell, beaten 5 m by Ozzie Corka (2:03.90) in NR up to 65 on March 20 at $6.50. Contender.

Contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced greenly from approx 1300m when leading the event.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 6 m as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:04.00) beating Muscle Town in 2 WINs on October 7 at $1.30. Prefer to see.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 6 m as favourite (Sr2) at this track (2:04.00) beating Muscle Town in 2 WINs on October 7 at $1.30. Prefer to see.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly after the start losing considerable ground.

form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early speed and racing wide at Bathurst, well beaten by Borrowed Time (2:03.30) in NR up to 60 on March 25 at $9. Before that, then settled down to finish eighth over 1730m at Bathurst last time out. Capable of a better showing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start 9th (Fr3) over 1730m after showing early speed and racing wide at Bathurst, well beaten by Borrowed Time (2:03.30) in NR up to 60 on March 25 at $9. Before that, then settled down to finish eighth over 1730m at Bathurst last time out. Capable of a better showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke stride shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst, beaten 22 m by She The Devil (2:02.60) in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $16. At the start before 7th (Sr2) over 1730m at Bathurst was 5th-9.06 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Beyond Doubt (2:06.10) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $12. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Sr1) over 1730m at Bathurst, beaten 22 m by She The Devil (2:02.60) in NR up to 57 on April 1 at $16. At the start before 7th (Sr2) over 1730m at Bathurst was 5th-9.06 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Beyond Doubt (2:06.10) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $12. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait during the score up and was out of position at the start.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Sr1) over 1710m at Goulburn was 8th-16.8 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Where Back (2:02.20) in NR up to 62 on March 30 at $41. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.5 m after showing early speed, (Fr3) at Canberra (2:40.80) beating Hello I Tea in NR up to 65 on March 9 at $4.20. Better than last start and can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up rounding the home turn.
Hung in marginally under pressure placing Smokin Pocket in to restricted room.
